title: Patch Bridge: Closing the Detection-to-Remediation Gap in CVE Lifecycle Management
description: Existing vulnerability scanners stop at detection. Patch Bridge is currently a design-stage proposal for bridging disclosure to remediation through reachability analysis, planned Idris2 proof obligations, and mitigation selection. The current repository describes an intended architecture and research agenda; it does not yet provide a runnable standalone tool, mechanised proof corpus, or validated remediation metrics.
notes: Patch Bridge originated as a module within panic-attacker and has been extracted into a standalone project. The current repository is still under audit and should be read as a design-stage artifact rather than a completed implementation.
